title: Democrat advances to runoff in Marjorie Taylor-Greene's deep-red district
author: Rob Beschizza
summary: Democrat Shawn Harris took a surprise lead in Georgia's 14th Congressional District special election, winning the most votes of any candidate and advancing to a runoff against Trump-endorsed Republican Clayton Fuller. With the rest of the crowded GOP field now gone, though, he may have to be content with having upset what should have been Fuller's coronation night. —
